hero.heading: Lashes, brows, glow — set in 90 minutes.
hero.subheading: A Glendale beauty boutique on East Broadway specializing in classic and volume lashes, microblading, lamination, and signature facials. Open every day, by appointment.

about.heading: Set your gaze. Set your day.
paragraphs: Lugali Beauty Lounge is the studio of Liana Galstyan — fifteen years of lash and brow work, ten of those in the Glendale area. We opened the Broadway space in 2024 with one chair, two estheticians, and a bright corner room.
Every appointment starts with a fifteen-minute consultation — your face shape, your goals, your patch test. We don't sell what doesn't suit. We do tell you the truth about what will and won't last.
Open every day, by appointment only. Same-day bookings often available — text the studio. We carry our retail line: bond serum, lash cleanser, brow gels we'd actually use ourselves.

services.title: Classic Lash Set
services.description: One extension per natural lash, hand-applied with medical-grade adhesive. Natural, awake look. 90 minutes, lasts 4–6 weeks with fills.

services.title: Volume Lash Set
services.description: Hand-made 3D–6D fans for fuller, denser look. Two-hour appointment. Includes aftercare kit and 24-hour fix guarantee.

services.title: Lash Lift + Tint
services.description: No extensions — your natural lashes lifted and tinted dark. Lasts 6–8 weeks, low maintenance, looks unreal.

services.title: Microblading + Powder Brows
services.description: Custom-shaped semi-permanent brows. Includes consultation, mapping, initial session, and 6-week touch-up. Two-year longevity.

services.title: Brow Lamination + Wax + Tint
services.description: Lifted, fuller-looking natural brows in one session. Lasts 6–8 weeks, includes shaping wax and tint.

services.title: Signature Facial
services.description: 60-minute custom facial — deep cleanse, enzyme exfoliation, hydrating mask, gua sha sculpting, LED therapy. Comes with a glow.

reviews.name: Sara K.
reviews.text: Best lashes I've ever had — they last six weeks, no irritation, and the shape is perfect for my eyes. Liana is a real artist. Worth the drive.

reviews.name: Anna T.
reviews.text: Got my brows microbladed and I cried (happy). They look so natural and the shape is exactly what I asked for. Healing was easy.

reviews.name: Vanessa M.
reviews.text: The signature facial is restorative. My skin glows for days after. The space is calm, the music is good, the products are clean. Bliss.

contact.mapEmbedQuery: Lugali Beauty Lounge 1004 E Broadway Glendale CA 91205
